summary: Added a light bridge from Chapter 12's late-night planning into the regatta opening and sharpened the closing consequence image so the handoff into Chapter 14's pale-gold kitchen fallout lands more cleanly; no opening-structure rewrite was needed because this chapter already enters differently from the next one.
